summary.en: A framework for turning environment signals and critical uncertainties into multiple plausible futures, then testing which business-model moves remain robust across them.
summary.zh: 一套把环境信号和关键不确定性转成多个可信未来，并检验哪些商业模式动作在多个情景下都稳健的框架。

sources.label: Peter Schwartz · The Art of the Long View · Currency Doubleday · 1991
Thomas J. Chermack · Scenario Planning in Organizations · Berrett-Koehler Publishers · 2011
Paul J. H. Schoemaker · Scenario Planning: A Tool for Strategic Thinking · Sloan Management Review · 1995

references.label: Peter Schwartz · The Art of the Long View · Currency Doubleday

note.en: Classic source for scenario thinking, driving forces, critical uncertainties, and strategy robustness across futures.
note.zh: 情景思考、驱动力、关键不确定性和跨未来稳健战略的经典来源。

references.label: Thomas J. Chermack · Scenario Planning in Organizations · Berrett-Koehler Publishers
references.pages: Performance-Based Scenario System; Project Preparation; Scenario Exploration; Scenario Development; Scenario Implementation; Project Assessment

note.en: Adds the organizational project, implementation, assessment, and human-perception layer to scenario planning.
note.zh: 补充情景规划的组织项目、实施、评估和人的感知层。

references.label: Paul J. H. Schoemaker · Scenario Planning: A Tool for Strategic Thinking · Sloan Management Review

note.en: Classic management article positioning scenario planning as a disciplined tool for strategic thinking under uncertainty.
note.zh: 把情景规划定位为不确定性下战略思考工具的经典管理文章。
